results.rendered_html:
kīrtanya (wie eben) adj. erwähnenswerth, erzählenswerth: (bhavataḥ) kīrtanyatīrthayaśasaḥ  BHĀG. P. 3,15,48 . 28,18 . te kīrtanyodārakarmaṇaḥ 20,6 . tāni me śraddadhānasya kīrtanyānyanukīrtaya 25,3 .
— Vgl. kīrtenya.
